question: How many blocks of stone did the Empress Nue Wo prepare at the Ta Huang Hills for repairing the heavens?
What is the infant name of Chen Shih-yin's daughter?
How much silver did Shih-yin give Yue-ts'un for his travelling expenses to the capital?
What is the surname of the newly-appointed Magistrate who turns out to be Yue-ts'un?
What was Lin Ju-hai's daughter's infant name?
Where did Yue-ts'un meet Leng Tzu-hsing by chance?
Who was the old colleague that brought Yue-ts'un the news about reinstated officers?
What gift did Pao-yue give to Tai-yue upon their first meeting, which he then smashed?
How many waiting maids did dowager lady Chia assign to Tai-yue?
What nickname did people give to young Hsueeh P'an?
What was the name of the kidnapped girl at the center of the manslaughter case?
Where did Mrs. Hsueeh and her children take up their quarters in the Jung mansion?
Whose wife, Mrs. Ch'in, led Pao-yue to rest when he felt tired during the flower-viewing banquet?
What are the four characters written on the stone tablet at the entrance of the Great Void?
answer: The confines of the Great Void

question: What is the title of the record that Pao-yue opens, containing entries about the most prominent girls of his province?
answer: The Principal Record of the Twelve Maidens of Chin Ling

question: How much silver did lady Feng give to old goody Liu?
What is the name of goody Liu's grandson whom she brings to the Jung mansion?
Who is the waiting-maid of lady Feng that goody Liu initially mistakes for lady Feng herself?
What kind of flowers does aunt Hsueeh send to the young ladies via Chou Jui's wife?
answer: Twelve twigs of artificial flowers of piled gauze, made in the palace

question: What is the name of the medicine that Pao Ch'ai takes for her ailment?
What is the name of the drunken old servant in the Ning mansion who abuses his masters?
What two lines are inscribed on the face of Pao-yue's jade?
answer: If thou wilt lose me not and never forget me, Eternal life and constant luck will be with thee

question: What inscription is on the face of Pao Ch'ai's golden locket?
answer: Part not from me and cast me not away

question: What three characters did Pao-yue write and have pasted above his door?
What book does Li Kuei tell Chia Cheng that Pao-yue has been reading up to?
answer: The third book of the Book of Odes

question: Who is the fellow-pupil that insults Ch'in Chung and starts the fight in the schoolroom?
Who does Chia Se send into the schoolroom to confront Chin Jung on behalf of Pao-yue?
Who recommended Dr. Chang to Chia Chen?
According to Dr. Chang, how many chances out of ten does Mrs. Ch'in's illness have of recovery?
What is the relationship between Chin Jung and Mrs. Huang?
answer: Chin Jung is Mrs. Huang's nephew

question: Whose birthday celebration is held at the Ning Mansion?
Who startles Lady Feng by suddenly appearing from behind an artificial rockery in the garden?
What food did Pao-yue eat that caused dowager lady Chia concern?
Where does Lady Feng tell Chia Jui to wait for her on the first night he is tricked?
answer: The corridor on the Eastern side

question: What does Chia Jui see when he looks at the back side of the Mirror of Voluptuousness?
How much money did Chia Jui write on each of the two promissory notes forced upon him?
What does Mrs. Ch'in advise Lady Feng to establish near the ancestral tombs to secure the family's future?
What is the name of Mrs. Ch'in's waiting-maid who killed herself by knocking her head against a post?
How much does Chia Chen pay the eunuch Tai Ch'uean to purchase an official post for Chia Jung?
What punishment does Lady Feng order for the servant who arrives late to his duties?
What news does Chao Erh bring back from Chia Lien?
At what time does Lady Feng arrive each morning to call the roll at the Ning Mansion?
What gift does the Prince of Pei Ching take off his own wrist and present to Pao-yue?
answer: A chaplet of pearls scented with Ling Ling

question: What is Pao-yue fascinated to see a village girl operating at the farmhouse?
How much money does Lady Feng demand from the Chang family to settle their legal dispute?
What position is Yuan-ch'un raised to by His Majesty?
answer: Overseer in the Feng Ts'ao Palace with the rank of worthy and virtuous secondary consort

question: How does Chin Ko kill herself?
answer: She strangles herself with a handkerchief

question: How much money does Lady Feng secretly pocket from the engagement affair?
What four-character motto does Pao-yue suggest for the first spot inside the garden gate?
answer: A tortuous path leading to a secluded nook

question: What name does Pao-yue propose for the farm-like village instead of apricot blossom village?
What kind of begonia in the garden is described as a foreign species from the maiden kingdom?
On what date is the imperial consort Yuan Ch'un's visit to her parents fixed?
answer: The fifteenth day of the first moon

question: What general name does Yuan Ch'un give to the garden?
Which actress does the Chia consort single out as the best and reward with extra gifts?
What food does Pao-yue save for Hsi Jen that Nurse Li ends up eating?
What is the name of the servant girl Ming Yen is caught with?
What three conditions does Hsi Jen set for Pao-yue in order to agree to stay?
answer: Stop saying unlucky things about death; behave as if fond of study before his father; stop bad habits like licking cosmetics off lips

question: Who drags Nurse Li away from Pao-yue's room to stop her tirade against Hsi Jen?
What speech defect does Tai-yue tease Hsiang-yuen about?
answer: She cannot pronounce Erh, saying Ai instead

question: What game are Pao-ch'ai, Hsiang Ling, and Ying Erh playing when Chia Huan joins them?
answer: Playing at chess with cash stakes

question: What did Pao-yue use to wash his face in the morning?
answer: The leftover water from Hsiang-yuen's face-washing

question: What was the original name of the waiting-maid whom Pao-yue renamed Ssu Erh?
What illness did lady Feng's daughter Ta Chieh Erh fall ill with?
Whose birthday is being celebrated on the 21st, and how old is she turning?
Which young actor did Hsiang-yuen say the boy playing a lady resembled?
What was the answer to dowager lady Chia's lantern riddle about the monkey's body gently resting on the tree top?
Where did Tai-yue choose to live when the young ladies moved into the Garden of Broad Vista?
What book was Pao-yue reading under the peach trees when Tai-yue found him?
What did Tai-yue propose doing with the fallen peach blossoms instead of throwing them in the water?
answer: Burying them in a hole she had dug

question: How much silver did Ni Erh lend to Chia Yuen?
What did Chia Yuen purchase to give as a present to lady Feng?
What was the surname and infant name of the servant-maid called Hsiao Hung?
answer: Surname Lin, infant name Hung Yue
